name: Quadrilateral Security Dialogue
climate: Spans diverse zones: temperate, tropical, arid, continental across four countries on three continents

neighbors.name: Indo-Pacific
neighbors.relevance: Quad is the primary security framework for the Indo-Pacific region

neighbors.name: ASEAN
neighbors.relevance: Quad engages ASEAN on maritime security, infrastructure, and supply chains

neighbors.name: AUKUS
neighbors.relevance: USA and Australia overlap; AUKUS defense technology complements Quad diplomatic agenda

neighbors.name: Five Eyes
neighbors.relevance: USA and Australia overlap; intelligence sharing supports Quad security coordination

neighbors.name: South China Sea
neighbors.relevance: Primary theater for Quad maritime domain awareness and freedom of navigation
